kubernetes_node_pool_autoscaling_descrip: You can configure auto-scaling for each of your node pools. This feature, sometimes called a cluster autoscaler, complements the Kubernetes horizontal pod autoscaler. Please keep in mind, the auto-scaling feature is not compatible with anti-affinity activation.
kubernetes_node_pool_autoscaling_desired: It is recommended that you configure a pool with a minimum of 3 nodes in order to optimise the rolling upgrade when you carry out security updates (patch updates) or minor version upgrades.
kubernetes_node_pool_billing_auto_scalin: Warning: using auto-scaling with monthly billing can lead to unexpected costs. Each node created by auto-scaling is billed immediately and covers the remainder of the current month. If this node is subsequently deleted due to a scale-down, you will still be billed until the end of the month. You will also be billed for inactive nodes. Avoid this configuration if your tasks often require frequent scaling up and down.
